best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a small window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 18 kJ, 7 s period, lully 0/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 6-9s at low tide can still work on Belgas if the sandbars are lined up.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for lunch — 13:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a clean small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0-0.3 m, 12 kJ, 7 s period, lully 0/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort; 6-9s at low tide is too dry and dumping for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; worth keeping on the radar because Surfline is showing it above Poor while most other local spots are Poor..  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at low tide is too dry and dumping for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; Supertubos looks below your bodyboard fun size; SwellMap rating 1/10 Poor — caution.
ranked.shortExplanation: Supertubos is worth a quick check for lunch — 13:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide is leaning more serious than easy here.
warnings: 6-9s at low tide is too dry and dumping for Supertubos / Molhe Leste
Supertubos looks below your bodyboard fun size
